# BabyLeveling

> BabyLeveling is a gamified baby-tracking app for iOS and Apple Watch that turns feeding,
> sleep, and growth logs into XP for a fantasy hero.

It does everything a serious baby tracker does — feeding, sleep, diapers, growth, health
records, family sharing, a full activity timeline — and reframes it as an RPG. Every logged
activity feeds a fantasy hero: feeding restores energy, sleep recovers HP, healthy habits earn
EXP, and milestones unlock achievements.

## Key facts

- Platforms: iPhone (iOS 17+) and Apple Watch.
- Category: gamified baby tracker / parenting RPG app.
- Two modes: RPG Mode (the same data as an adventure) and Parent Mode (clean,
  pediatrician-ready charts and records) — neither is a skin on the other.
- Core mechanics: XP & Levels, Daily Quests, Skill Tree, Achievements, Streaks & Buffs,
  Apple Watch 2-tap logging.
- Three visual themes per baby: Royal ("Soft power."), Warrior ("Forged in fire."), Zen
  ("Gentle and intentional.").
- Family sharing: partners and grandparents join the same baby's quest and timeline.
- Status: pre-launch. Pricing is not yet set. Join the waitlist for launch-day access.
- Privacy: baby data belongs to the user; it is not sold or shared with advertisers.
- Differentiator: the only baby tracker where caring for your child levels up a hero —
  competitors (Huckleberry, Baby Tracker, Glow Baby) track activity without a reward loop.

## Pages

- Home (full narrative + waitlist, including features, the care-to-XP mechanic, Parent
  Mode, and FAQ): /
- Features — every feature in depth: /features
- RPG System — how the care-to-XP loop works: /rpg-system
- For Parents — Parent Mode, rigor, and data privacy: /parents
- Pricing — not yet set; waitlist members hear first: /pricing
- FAQ — standalone, full question list: /faq
